subject: Revert "xinmotek fix (#11)"
author: Sorgelig

impact.effect_if_absent: No effect — reverting this revert would re-introduce the duplicate quirk from a6165424f, which is functionally harmless but redundant. The device support remains in upstream code regardless.

notes: CONTEXT: This revert commit removes the duplicate HID quirk entry that was incorrectly added by commit a6165424f. The correct state (single entry for XIN_MO DUAL_ARCADE with MULTI_INPUT quirk) is maintained in vanilla 6.18 via upstream commit c62f7cd8ed06 (2019-12-01). The revert correctly restores the source tree to its intended state. Both commits (add + revert) are net-zero; neither carries forward any real content. Device support is 100% upstream; no carried patches are needed. The revert occurred 1.5 years after the accidental duplicate was added, suggesting the issue was eventually noticed and corrected by the fork maintainer.
